title: Google Contacts GET operation requires exact ID
symptom: When attempting to retrieve a contact using the GET operation, n8n returns an error stating 'Need to provide exact ID'. This prevents the retrieval of the specified contact.
root_cause: The Google Contacts API requires an exact ID to retrieve a contact. If the ID is not correctly defined or passed in the workflow, the API will return an error indicating that the ID is needed.
fix_steps: Open the Google Contacts node settings
Ensure the Contact ID field is set to use the correct expression, e.g., `{{ $json.Contact_ID }}`
agent_instruction: Set the Contact ID in the Google Contacts node to use the expression `{{ $json.Contact_ID }}`.
